title: Executive Order 7889—Revocation of Executive Order No. 7520 of December 18, 1936, Withdrawing Lands for Use of the War Department as a Target Range for the Arizona National Guard
text:
ARIZONA
By virtue of and pursuant to the authority vested in me by the act of June 25, 1910, ch. 421, 36 stat. 847, Executive Order No. 7520 of December 18, 1936, withdrawing lands for use of the War Department as a target range for the Arizona National Guard, is hereby revoked.
FRANKLIN D. ROOSEVELT
The White House,
May 16, 1938
.
